title: VPB Steampunk Guns
description: Addon to Vic's Point Blank adding Create-styled steampunk guns. Three guns added so far, possibly with more to come.
body:
## THIS IS NOT A DATAPACK, IT IS A POINT BLANK CONTENT PACK
This means you'll add it to your game in a different place, scroll to the bottom of the description to learn how.


# Description
## Content
This is an addon for Vic's Point Blank (tested on VPB v1.5+) adding Create-styled steampunk guns. So far adds:
* Gyro Shotgun

![Rendered image of a magazine fed semi automatic shotgun. It has 3 cogs for front and rear ironsights, and 2 gyros styled like Clockwork mod on either side.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00bd641c37278ffc20d20b487c80bc5b94ac2b75_0.webp)
* Steam Rifle

![Rendered image of a brown semi automatic magazine fed rifle with brass screws. It has an ejection port on the right side.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc405ddab6dc20d4256eccba3725bc5abce49f1b_0.webp)
* Cog Revolver

![Rendered image of a single action revolver. The cylinder has gear teeth on it and there is a shaft with two cogs below it above the trigger.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dce521fdb67e6fbf5bbdedcb0b460441b8ae204_0.webp)


## To Add the Pack:
* Create the `pointblank/` folder in your modpack folder. It should look like `[modpackname]/pointblank/`
* Put the pack (should be `.zip`) in the `pointblank/` folder
* Launch the game and enjoy!

## If You Need Help:
Join the [Point Blank Community Discord](https://discord.gg/JC9czn4BjC)! I'm there as @EndDragon438
